# openshift_agent_iso (Resource)

Generates an OpenShift Agent-Based Installer ISO from your existing install-config.yaml and agent-config.yaml. One ISO boots all servers — list every host's MAC address and role in agent_config. Write to USB once, boot each server sequentially. Optionally uploads the ISO to a bastion host for PXE serving via openshift_pxe_server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `agent_config` (String) Contents of agent-config.yaml. List ALL hosts with their MAC addresses and roles (master/worker). The same ISO will correctly configure each server based on its MAC. Tip: agent_config = file("agent-config.yaml")
- `install_config` (String) Contents of install-config.yaml. Tip: use file() to read your existing config: install_config = file("install-config.yaml")

### Optional

- `bastion_host` (String) Bastion host to upload the ISO to (for PXE serving). Leave empty to keep ISO local only.
- `bastion_iso_dir` (String) Directory on the bastion to upload the ISO to.
- `bastion_port` (Number) SSH port on the bastion host. Defaults to 22.
- `bastion_ssh_key` (String, Sensitive) PEM-encoded SSH private key for bastion upload.
- `bastion_user` (String) SSH user on the bastion host. Defaults to core.
- `install_binary` (String) Path to the openshift-install binary.
- `work_dir` (String) Working directory for openshift-install agent create image.

### Read-Only

- `bastion_iso_url` (String) HTTP URL of the ISO on the bastion (set when bastion_host is provided). Use as iso_path in openshift_pxe_server.
- `checksum_sha256` (String) SHA256 checksum of the ISO. Verify after writing to USB: sha256sum /dev/sdX
- `iso_path` (String) Local path to the generated ISO file.
- `iso_size_bytes` (Number) Size of the generated ISO in bytes.
